futurum

Marks a test case as pending future work with a reason.

Aliases: todo, pending

Syntax: proba futurum

Category

testing

Related

  • [proba](/corpus/proba.html)
  • [omitte](/corpus/omitte.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/futurum/futurum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Marks a test case as pending future work with a reason.

# futurum — todo test modifier
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   testModifier :← 'futurum' stringLit
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only test modifier (whitelist: futurum/futurum.fab).
#

proba "async file operations" futurum "needs async support" {
    adfirma verum
}

Expected output:

Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/futurum/futurum.fab"]
